hr.applicant.rich_description:
The user wants a functional description for the Odoo model `hr.applicant` (Applicant). I need to generate a rich, semantically dense description in French, 4-6 sentences, without introduction/title/bullets, for a functional user (not developer), including business role, concrete use cases, and common synonyms. I should not repeat the technical model name `hr.applicant` as-is.

Key aspects of hr.applicant in Odoo:
- It's the candidate/applicant in the Recruitment module (Recrutement).
- Represents a person applying for a job position (poste, offre d'emploi).
- Tracks the recruitment pipeline: new, in progress, hired, refused.
- Contains candidate info: name, email, phone, CV/resume (attachments), applied job, department, recruiter, source, stage.
- Use cases: tracking job applications, managing recruitment pipeline, CV database, candidate evaluation, interview scheduling, hiring process.
- Synonyms: candidat, postulant, demandeur d'emploi, profil de recrutement, dossier de candidature, fiche candidat, pipeline de recrutement.

res.partner.bank.rich_description:
The user wants a functional description for the Odoo model `res.partner.bank` (Bank Accounts).

Key information from the technical description:
- Model name: res.partner.bank
- Technical description: "Bank Accounts"
- Fields:
  - acc_number: Account Number
  - acc_holder_name: Account Holder Name
  - bank_id: Bank (many2one)
  - bank_name: Name
  - bank_bic: Bank Identifier Code (BIC/SWIFT)
  - partner_id: Account Holder (many2one to res.partner)
  - company_id: Company
  - currency_id: Currency
  - active: Active
  - allow_out_payment: Send Money (boolean)
  - journal_id: Account Journal (one2many? Actually it's many2one usually, but technical says one2many - wait, looking at the input: "journal_id [one2many]" - actually in standard Odoo it's many2one, but I should focus on the functional aspect)
  - routing: ABA/Routing
  - acc_type: Type (selection)
  - display_name: Display Name
  - sanitized_acc_number: Sanitized Account Number

Functional role:
- This model stores bank account details for partners (customers, vendors, employees) and/or the company itself.
- Used in payments, invoices, direct debits, wire transfers, SEPA.
- Each record links a partner to a specific bank account with details like IBAN

res.partner.rich_description:
The user wants a rich functional description for the Odoo model `res.partner`, which is technically described as "Contact". The description should be in French, 4-6 sentences, no introduction, no title, no bullet points. It should include the business role, concrete use cases, and common business synonyms. Do not repeat the technical model name (`res.partner`) as-is.

Looking at the fields provided:
- active: boolean
- active_lang_count: integer
- additional_info: char
- avatar fields (binary)
- bank_account_count: integer
- bank_ids: one2many (Banks)
- barcode: char
- calendar_last_notif_ack: datetime
- category_id: many2many (Tags)
- channel_ids: many2many (Channels)
- child_ids: one2many (Contact)
- city: char
- color: integer
- comment: html (Notes)
- commercial_company_name: char
- commercial_partner_id: many2one

This model represents partners/contacts in Odoo. It can be customers, vendors/suppliers, employees, or any other contact. It's central to CRM, Sales, Purchases, Accounting, etc.

Key business roles:
- Central repository for all physical or moral persons interacting with the company
- Customers (clients), vendors (fournisseurs), prospects
- Can represent companies or individuals
- Used across all modules: sales orders, purchase orders, invoices, payments, shipping, etc

 Key functional aspects of `mail.channel` in Odoo:
 - It's the backbone of Odoo's Discuss module.
 - Represents conversation spaces: channels (public/private), group chats, livechat channels.
 - Used for internal communication, team collaboration, live chat with customers.
 - Members can be users or partners (customers).
 - Can be linked to groups for auto-subscription.
 - Has a type (channel, chat, livechat).
 - Contains messages.
 - Can have chatbots (for livechat).
 - Display name, description, avatar, invitation URL.
